Package com.wip.service

Interface TrackingUpdateService

All Known Implementing Classes:
TrackingUpdateServiceImpl
public interface TrackingUpdateService
Service interface for managing tracking updates.

Defines the contract for creating, retrieving, and deleting tracking milestones associated with a shipment.

Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rohith Varma K

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TrackingUpdateDto
    addTrackingUpdate(Long shipmentId, TrackingUpdateDto trackingUpdateDto)
    Adds a new tracking update to a shipment.
    void
    deleteTrackingUpdate(Long updateId)
    Deletes a tracking update.
    List<TrackingUpdateDto>
    getAllTrackingUpdates()
    Retrieves all tracking updates in the system.
    TrackingUpdateDto
    getTrackingUpdateById(Long updateId)
    Retrieves a tracking update by its ID.
    List<TrackingUpdateDto>
    getTrackingUpdatesByShipmentId(Long shipmentId)
    Retrieves all tracking updates for a given shipment.
    List<TrackingUpdateDto>
    search(String keyword)
    Searches for tracking updates using a keyword.

  • Method Details

    • addTrackingUpdate

      TrackingUpdateDto addTrackingUpdate(Long shipmentId, TrackingUpdateDto trackingUpdateDto)
      Adds a new tracking update to a shipment.
      Parameters:
      shipmentId - the unique identifier of the shipment
      trackingUpdateDto - the tracking update details
      Returns:
      the created tracking update details

    • getTrackingUpdatesByShipmentId

      List<TrackingUpdateDto> getTrackingUpdatesByShipmentId(Long shipmentId)
      Retrieves all tracking updates for a given shipment.
      Parameters:
      shipmentId - the unique identifier of the shipment
      Returns:
      a chronological list of tracking updates

    • getTrackingUpdateById

      TrackingUpdateDto getTrackingUpdateById(Long updateId)
      Retrieves a tracking update by its ID.
      Parameters:
      updateId - the unique identifier of the tracking update
      Returns:
      the tracking update details

    • deleteTrackingUpdate

      void deleteTrackingUpdate(Long updateId)
      Deletes a tracking update.
      Parameters:
      updateId - the unique identifier of the tracking update to delete

    • search

      List<TrackingUpdateDto> search(String keyword)
      Searches for tracking updates using a keyword.
      Parameters:
      keyword - the search string
      Returns:
      a list of tracking updates matching the criteria

    • getAllTrackingUpdates

      List<TrackingUpdateDto> getAllTrackingUpdates()
      Retrieves all tracking updates in the system.
      Returns:
      a list of all tracking updates
